title: CHILD, ADOLESCENT, AND FAMILY SERVICES - 211info
text: LIFESTANCE HEALTH PORTLAND STARK STREET CHILD, ADOLESCENT, AND FAMILY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health evaluations; individual, family, and faith-based counseling; and psychiatric medication evaluation and management services. 12636 SE Stark Street Suite 125 Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: Ages 0-17 Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm (503) 253-4600 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 253-4600 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service. Accepts Medicaid, Medicare, and most private insurances. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Family Counseling * Adolescents Family Counseling * Children Mental Health Evaluation * Adolescents Mental Health Evaluation * Children Psychiatric Medication Services * Adolescents Psychiatric Medication Services * Children Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIFESTANCE HEALTH PORTLAND STARK STREET
